response.original_title: ヌードモデルNTR 上司と羞恥に溺れた妻の衝撃的浮気映像 木村玲衣
response.overview: My wife and I were so happy, we never imagined something like this would happen... I've been married to my former colleague, Rei, for five years. She left her job to get married and has been a full-time housewife supporting me ever since. Then she suggested to me, "Why don't we do a nude photoshoot for our wedding anniversary?" I was more embarrassed than artistic, so during a work break, I jokingly mentioned it to my boss, Oshima. The moment he heard it, Oshima's eyes lit up, and he quickly arranged the photoshoot, saying he knew a professional photographer.
response.title: Nude Model NTR: Shocking Footage of a Wife's Affair with Her Boss, Drowning in Shame - Rei Kimura
